entry.title: 🇩🇪 Hands-on with the btp CLI and APIs
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the Core Service APIs for SAP BTP and also the command line interface tool for SAP BTP, otherwise known as the btp CLI.

This CodeJam introduces attendees to btp, the CLI for the SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP). It also introduces attendees to the APIs for SAP BTP, known as Core Services for SAP BTP, which, according to the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, allow you to "manage, build, and extend the core capabilities of SAP BTP."

After completing this CodeJam, you have gained an overview of some of the core components from which SAP BTP is composed. You will also be then familiar with how to use the btp CLI on the command line, and also in scripts, to view, administer and generally manage these components and resources on SAP BTP. You'll also have a good understanding of what is possible with the APIs, and perhaps more critically, how to prepare and use authentication for them.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Fri 07 Jun 2024 in Leverkusen, Germany. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The event is kindly being hosted by Covestro in Germany, thank you! The location of the event is idea.lab Atelier on the ground floor of Building E54 in their offices in Leverkusen. Please aim to arrive at 0900 local time to get set up and plugged in, for a start at 0930.

The instructor is Developer Advocate DJ Adams. 

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-btp-cli-api-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md 

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page. Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. In that context, if you indicate that you're attending, and later realise you're unable to, please remove your name so that others get a chance instead. Thanks!

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: Table DDNTF is not active in the dictionary error during DMO
entry.content: Did you check the SAP notes about DDNTF?

entry.title: SAP build action - 403 error for POST API call with CSRF enabled
entry.content:
I'm trying to upload attachment in SAP using API with SAP build process automation and action.

API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV is the standard API used to upload attachment for WO. I tried to configure it in Actions but it result in 403 error for POST api call with CSRF enabled. So I tried to get token with GET call first and then used the same token in POST call as static value which works fine as well.

I'm not sure why POST api call throw 403 error with CSRF enabled...

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Mentoring
entry.content:
Hi

Having trouble finding the answer to this elsewhere, but can a Mentor also be a Mentee?  This seems like an obvious requirement in a large organisation, but is it possible in SF Mentoring? 

Thanks,

Emily

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly ad...

entry.title: Problem with Select-Options
entry.content:
Hi

I have a select options which displays some values from where which user can select multiple values.

Now the problem here is when i press enter after selecting some values the value at first index gets replaced by the value at last index. Can you give me a reason why that is happening and what can i do to resolve it.

This is the F4 Help that is displayed:

and this is how how the values are in select options: (First index replaced by last)

Below is the code for implementing f4 help: 

Implemented in Event - at selection screen on value request

1. Used FM - 'F4_FIELD_ON_VALUE_REQUEST'  to capture selected values in LT_RETURN.

2. Appending values to select-options

LOOP AT lt_return INTO DATA(ls_return).
      s_tabnam-low = ls_return-fieldval.
      s_tabnam-sign = 'I'.
      s_tabnam-option = 'EQ'.
      APPEND s_tabnam.
      CLEAR: ls_return, s_tabnam.
    ENDLOOP.

Regards,

Farhan

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Set Advanced Filters on Date and Version
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

currently I am working with Advanced Filters. I want to set the Filter based on Date and Version. Like you can see in the image:

The outcome does not meet my excpectation:

As you can see "2 Forecast III" is also shown in the years 2022, 2023 and 2024 (not in image). But my expectation was that for "2 Forecast III" only 2024 is shown.

What is the issue in this case?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Re: A Guide to Developing and Deploying Content Packages for SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition
entry.content:
@jens_kristenthnx a lot for this blog. I hope this makes life a little bit easier.

Best regards,
Timo

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
@PraveenChitturi 

You can create multiple users. I copied the default user 'DEVELOPER' multiple times and all the new accounts work fine. 🙂

entry.title: Re: A Guide to Developing and Deploying Content Packages for SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition
entry.content:
@SF11the supported entites are UI cards, pages and spaces. You cannot add tiles (=app launcher) to it.

btw: for most app tiles, this would not make much sense in my view, as the tiles are generated by content providers (e.g. S/4HANA systems, UI5 apps deployed in the HTML5 repository).
I would only see the use case for mass-maintenance of manual apps - but this is what we do not recommend.

Best regards,
Timo

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere multiplies number of entries
entry.content: Hello, I'm encountering the same problem. Have you managed to solve it?

entry.title: Re: On Uploading PDF or PPt File Getting 403 Error Forbidden
entry.content:
If you can't see that request in the traces of the gateway system, then the 403 response must be coming from an additional network component between the browser and the gateway, perhaps a firewall or a proxy.

Activate something like HttpWatch in the browser, then you can see the complete response (headers and body), and that might give you more clues about where this 403 response is coming from.

entry.title: Unable to add to the credit limit on existing user.
entry.content:
Customer expects to add on to the existing credit limit for ex. existing credit limit is 100000 and we want to add the credit limit of 1500 i.e. New credit limit = 100000+1500=101500.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to add to the credit limit on existing user.
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please, refer the infromation given in SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3461549/E

 

Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: How to get the certificate SAPSSLA.pse?
entry.content:
Dear SAP

When I run TCODE STC01,it happens  "@M4@ 2024.04.15 / 14:57:43    @5C\QError@    No certificate list found for >/usr/sap/S4D/D00/sec/SAPSSLA.pse<        @15@    2024.04.15    14:57:44    100028125"

How to solve it?

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,
 
Hope this comment finds you well!...
 
Please Consider this issue as high priority
 
Recently i have purchased the six attempts by using the campaign code following the instruction from the source link -Certification redemption process link - How to use a campaign code during an online booking. My orders are getting cancelled because of which i am not able to schedule the exam so i have dropped an email to training.india@sap.co , training.ssc.india@sap.com, what is the issue why my orders are getting canceled they told you can not purchase 6 attempts you can purchase only 1 attempt but the redemption link it is mentioned we can purchase 6 attempts attaching the email conversation screenshot for your reference. Please confirm whether we can book 6 attempts or 1 attempt by using campaign code?
 
cancelled order numbers - 1290304,1292020
Email/User ID for login - niteeshreddy.gadhireddy@gmail.com
User ID - P2007186087

entry.title: Re: Help – Why don't I get a situation notification?
entry.content:
Hello @Dr_Joerg_Rett,

Correct me if I am wrong Joerg, but I guess the email content and the URL can be modified from the app Manage Email notifications.

Hello @senahb ,

Please use the below templates from the app Manage Email notifications.

YY1_EMAIL_TEMPLATE_AGGR

YY1_EMAIL_TEMPLATE_SINGLE

In these templates you can enter the URL of your choice.

Regards,

TK.

entry.title: Is there an API for cost accounting results in S/4 Hana cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert:

 1、Enter the "Manage Sales Quotations" app and find the quotation form

 

2、Select the quotation line items that require cost accounting and select Attachment - Cost Accounting

 

 

3、Performing cost accounting resulted in the following results.

I would like to know if there is an API available here for third-party queries.

If you could assist me with any questions, I would greatly appreciate it. 

 

Song

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

Hello @David_Chaviano , 

I am grateful for your big help to us achieving the SAP certificate.

I am presently an university student and I am interesed in learning more about SAP. I was informed from my lecturer of the SAP global certificate that can help me a lot in becoming a SAP consultant. I would greatly appreciate to have a chance making a first step in the SAP community.

Thank you for your support!

entry.title: SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Logistics FAQ
entry.content:
In this article, we summarize and regularly update this article to reflect the latest developments and changes in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. In this way, we want to provide you with a comprehensive and timely updated resource to help you better understand and leverage the capabilities of SAP products.

The features covered in this article are based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2402, please refer to the latest information for changes in subsequent versions.

1 Logistics – Procurement and sourcing, inventory management and other supply chain related

1.1 Material management

1.1.1 Material Master Data FAQs

Q: Can the material code be expanded from 18 digits to 40 digits?

A: No, you cannot

Q: Does the T-code MM50 to extended material view have corresponding functions on ERP Cloud?

A: Yes we can use migration template to mass change material。 Please refer to blog The Substitute of MM50 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

1.2 Operational Procurement

1.2.1 Frequently Asked Questions about Purchase Prices

Q: Purchase Order China Tax Included Purchase Price Solution

A: Please refer to the blog for a detailed explanation of the automatic calculation of the net price including tax

Q: Is it possible to hide the price of a purchase order through permission management?

A: This can be achieved with enhancement points. Refer to the blog How to configure the Purchase Order Line Item Net Price field to be read-only or hidden

Q: Is it possible for a purchase requisition to hide prices through permission management?

A: This can be achieved with enhancement points. Please refer to the blog How to Enhance the Implementation of Hidden Purchase Requisitions Valuation Prices, or Change to Must-Lose

Q: The Monitor Purchase Order Item app does not have a total price field and there is no tax amount. It is desirable that the amount to be invoiced can also be calculated based on the actual quantity received.

A: It can be developed and implemented by the embedded SAC. Please refer to the Purchase Reconciliation Dashboard for Embedded SAC Customer Use Case Sharing in the blog

1.2.2 Frequently Asked Questions about Advance Payment for Purchase Orders (For more information, please refer to the blog)

Q: How do I control that the amount of the down payment cannot exceed the net value of the purchase order line item?

A: You can request an expert configuration by creating an SAP WCR customer event to configure the yellow warning as a red error to prevent overpayment. For more information, please refer to the blog S4HC Advance Payment Application Over Net Order.

1.2.3 Frequently Asked Questions about Purchase Order Output (For more information, please refer to the blog.))

Q: Can a custom field be added to the output management decision tree BRF?

A: Yes, you can bundle the customized field to BRF。 Refer to 2818157 - Custom field is not shown in output parameter determination

1.2.4 Frequently Asked Questions about Procurement Approval

Q: How do I enable email notifications for pending purchase orders?

A: Email notifications can be enabled by following the steps in this Help document.

For more related blogs, please refer to the Introduction to the Restart Purchase Order Flexible Workflow Feature and the Purchase Requisition Workflow Rework Feature Configuration Details

1.3 Invoice Management

1.3.1 Invoice Management FAQs

Q: How do I prevent duplicate validation of purchase orders?

A: Please refer to S4HC 发票校验查重配置

Q: How to post the purchasing freight cost to material cost?

A: Unplanned freight cost can be posted via subsequent debit please refer to blog

1.4 Supplier Management

1.4.1 Supplier Management FAQs

Q: How do you manage supplier performance?

A: Please refer to S4HC Supplier Operational Evaluation Score Calculation Examples

1.5 Sourcing and contract management

1.5.1 Frequently Asked Questions about Procurement Information Records

Q: What CDS view is required for price analysis in the purchase information record? Several existing CDSs starting with A are not open.

A: Correlate I_PurgInfoRecdOrgPlntDataApi01 with I_PurgPrcgConditionRecord. For more details, please refer to the blog S4HC Procurement Information Record Tiered Price Report Development

Q: How do I modify purchase information records in bulk?

A: For details, please refer to Blog S/4HANA Cloud to Modify Purchasing Information Records in Bulk and Blog to Update Procurement Information Records in Batches

1.6 Inventory Management

1.6.1 Frequently Asked Questions on Movement of Goods

Q: How do I prevent a purchase order line item from being marked with a receipt of an entry that has been delivered?

A: The new Fiori APP can be achieved with enhancement points. For more details, refer to the blog Purchase Order Line Item Marked on Delivery Completed and Still Able to Receive It

Q: How can I use permission management to make the inventory manager not see the price information on the item voucher?

A: The standard function of permission management is achievable. For more information, please refer to the blog Inventory Management Role Configuration Value and Price are not visible

Q: Inventory receipt and receipt report to query the receipt and dispatch data of a fixed time period

A: The standard functions can be viewed through the 'Inventory Overview - Chinese Mainland Taiwan app. If there is a special definition logic, it can also be developed and implemented by the embedded SAC. Please refer to the blog Embedded Analytics Customer Use Case Sharing for Invoicing Reports.

Q: Inventory Aging Report in Greater China

A: Embedded SAC can help in this case. Please refer to嵌入式SAC客户用例分享之库龄分析。 3 System Landscape can also achieve this. Refer to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, ABAP Environment Case 7: Inventory Aging Report

1.6.2 Cross-Company Dumps FAQ (For more frequently asked questions, please refer to the blog.))

Q: What is the difference between advanced intercompany dumps and traditional intercompany dumps?

A: For more details, please refer to the blog Advanced Intercompany Dump (5HP).

Q: Can I create an STO by API in traditional intercompany dump 1P9?

A: No, you cannot. The CIP was rejected due to the product policy at the time, and the CIP could be reopened.

More传统公司间库存转储 (1P9) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition和高级公司间库存转储 (5HP) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

2 Production – Production planning, execution, engineering and R&D, quality management and other manufacturing related to manufacturing

2.1 Production master data management

2.1.1 BOM FAQs

Q: Batch export BOM

A: You can use API：https://api.sap.com/api/API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV_0002/resource  GET /ExplodeBOM； Help has more coding details。

Q: Bulk update BOM

A: For 2 System Landscape，please refer to2024 what’s new。 3 System Landscape please refer to SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, ABAP Environment Case 6: BOM Batch Extraction

Q: Mass updating Routing

A: You can refer to API: API_PRODUCTION_ROUTING&BOM:API_BILL_OF_MATERIAL_SRV_0002

2.2 Production Execution

2.2.1 Production Order FAQs

Q: How can I prevent the receipt of goods on the work order after the technical completion of the production order (work order)?

A: It can be solved by configuration, refer to the blog Production Process Management Optimization (1) How to realize that the material can no longer be issued and the receipt can be confirmed after the technical completion of the production order in SAP ERP cloud. If you have more customization needs, you can also write through enhancements when you receive the goods, refer to the blog.

entry.title: Re: Issue during transfer of inspection result recording...
entry.content:
Hi Gizem,

The Error "Set either the acceptance or the rejection indicator" is from the BAPI BAPI_INSPOPER_RECORDRESULTS when doing results recording.
You may need to check below settings in your ERP.
1) Please make sure the Upper/Lower limits are maintained. If Upper/Lower limit is missing, and you are trying to compare the results, the characteristic result can not be evaluated. 

2) You may check the reasonable unit in inspection characteristic and sample size, make sure the conversion factor between them.

Hope it can help you.

Please let me know, if you need further support.

Best Regards,

Maria

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities
entry.content:
Must be missing something basic here, created an account with foursquare yesterday buttons are greyed out:

UPDATE: Personal e-mail works.

entry.title: Re: I am using exit_saplkedrcopa_001 for enhancement to p...
entry.content:
that's why I suspect an error in the code that causes different behavior between creation and modification.
Of course, the error could be elsewhere, in one of the user-exits such as document save prepare, for example.

entry.title: Issue with "if then else"
entry.content:
having issue while passing output of "if then else" to target field in CPI message mapping. only partial value is sent. But in display queue of "if then else" we can see the full value. The same logic is working in another message mapping. Not sure about the root cause.

TIA

entry.title: Re: Generative AI Hub - OUT NOW!
entry.content: Thank you Peter, Appreciate your support !

entry.title: Re: I am using exit_saplkedrcopa_001 for enhancement to p...
entry.content:
DATA: ls_ce0vgoc TYPE ce0vgoc.
*
  CASE i_operating_concern.

    WHEN 'VGOC'.


      e_exit_is_active = 'X'.


      ls_ce0vgoc = i_copa_item.

      SELECT vbak~kunnr,
            vbap~matnr
       FROM vbak AS vbak
       INNER JOIN vbap AS vbap
       ON vbak~kunnr = vbap~kunnr_ana
       WHERE vbap~vkorg_ana = @LieneS_ce0vgoc-vkorg
       AND vbak~bukrs_vf = @LieneS_ce0vgoc-bukrs
       AND vbap~matnr = @LieneS_ce0vgoc-artnr
       AND vbak~kunnr = @LieneS_ce0vgoc-kndnr
       INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_matnr).

      IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
        SORT lt_matnr BY kunnr.

        DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_matnr COMPARING kunnr.
      ENDIF.

      IF lt_matnr IS NOT INITIAL.
        SELECT mcsh~name,
               mcsh~hname,
               mcsh~parent
            FROM mcshierb AS mcsh
            INNER JOIN @LT_matnr AS itab
            ON mcsh~name = itab~kunnr
            OR mcsh~name = itab~matnr
            INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_mcsh).

        IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
          SORT lt_mcsh BY hname.
          DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_mcsh COMPARING hname.
        ENDIF.

        SELECT mcsh~hname,
                       mcsh~id,
                       mcsh~name
                  FROM mcshierb AS mcsh
                  INNER JOIN @LT_mcsh AS itab
                  ON mcsh~id = itab~parent
                  AND mcsh~hname = itab~hname
                  INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_final).
      ENDIF.

      IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
        SORT lt_final BY hname.
        DELETE ADJACENT DUPLICATES FROM lt_final COMPARING hname.
      ENDIF.

      IF lt_final IS NOT INITIAL.
        LOOP AT lt_final ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<lfs_final>).
          CASE <lfs_final>-hname.

            WHEN 'SE_PRODGRP'.

              ls_ce0vgoc-zzww101 = <lfs_final>-id.

            WHEN 'SE_PRODTYP'.

              ls_ce0vgoc-zzww102 = <lfs_final>-id.

            WHEN 'SE_CUSTGRP'.

              ls_ce0vgoc-zzww103 = <lfs_final>-id.

          ENDCASE.

        ENDLOOP.

      ENDIF.

      e_copa_item = ls_ce0vgoc.

  ENDCASE.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX delete row
entry.content:
In the end I've created a new method SET_INTERNAL_TABLE copied from SET_TABLE but changing the line

lo_tabdescr->get_ddic_field_list( 

with:

lo_tabdescr->get_components( )

I'll add a new parameter fieldcat to add more functionality to this method.

Regards

entry.title: Re: I am using exit_saplkedrcopa_001 for enhancement to p...
entry.content: Above is the code in ZXKKEU11

entry.title: Re: Problem with Select-Options
entry.content:
You sorted the list by key (the red arrow next to table name)

If you really want this order, then sort RETURN_TAB too, but that shoudn't change anything in the select criteria result in the following SELECT. (what were the values of field RECORDPOS in the RETURN_TAB?)

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK: Attachment delete button not working in Web...
entry.content:
@istvanhermanWe just released 24.4 release on MDK web preview runtime and it includes this fix.

Please do the following:

  • delete .project.json in your MDK project in BAS
  • Deploy to Cloud Foundry and select Preview option (24.4.0)

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly ad...
entry.content: I could not see the screenshot for AW01N which provided before. If I remember correctly, the acquisition posted on old asset is on fiscal year 2023. Would you please try to post the transfer with the same date of the acquisition posting posted on the old asset and then check the simulation result.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Set Advanced Filte...
entry.content:
@guenay 

If I remember correctly Advance Filtering only works on booked data. I think it does not work on unbooked data.

 

3028328 - Unexpected columns show in table when using advanced Filter in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) - SAP for Me

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP Master Data Integration issue for Subscription Bi...
entry.content:
Hi

This looks like the connection between MDI and SAP Subscription Billing is not setup correctly. Please refer to this document for how to set up connectivity: https://help.sap.com/docs/subscription-billing/integration/set-up-connectivity 

The connection between MDI and SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud also need to be set up so that the data can flow from S/4HANA <-> MDI <-> SAP Subscription Billing. please refer to this document: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/34ee350171bf41bb8d015f8061a5a918.html?locale=en-US 

another document maybe help is talking about the Master Data Integration: https://help.sap.com/docs/master-data-integration/sap-master-data-integration-prod/integration?locale=en-US 

Hope these info helps!

entry.title: Re: Integration ByDesign and Digital Payments
entry.content:
Dear @Reinhard_Herbst ,
Do you have advice if we want to set up E-wallet in SAP ByD without integration? 

Regards,
Toom

entry.title: How does valies assigned to fields Menge an BETRAG at start of FM ' mb_calculate_values' ?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
How does valies assigned to fields Menge an BETRAG.

During the posting it goes to MM07MFF9_F_SEGMENTE_GENERIEREN 

inside  ENHANCEMENT-SECTION     F_SEGMENTE_GENERIEREN_02 SPOTS ES_SAPMM07M. 

The fields are filling with strange values ( MENGE = 1.2000000000000000E+01, BETRAG = 4.9000000000000000E+01 ) 

And if there an enhancement to change them?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Custom Tile Translation is not working
entry.content:
Hello,

I got the same issue. I have translated it but the changes won't be pulled.

Regards

Andreas

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Mentoring
entry.content:
@EVThomas 

Menotr can be a mentee in the same program within SuccessFactors.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Set Advanced Filte...

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK: Attachment delete button not working in Web...
entry.content: Thank you, it is working.

entry.title: Re: ABAP2XLSX delete row
entry.content:
Untested, but from memory it's something like:

data(sheet) = excel->get_active_worksheet( ).
data(row) = sheet->get_row( 1 ).
sheet->get_rows( )->remove( row ).

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK: Attachment delete button not working in Web...
entry.content: Could you tell me what 'preview' means exactly and when the new features will be available in the 'production'?

entry.title: Re: SAP FIORI My Inbox - QM
entry.content:
Hi,

are you still facing this issue?

I also had some trouble in the past with these workflows, for me the following solution worked:

- Please check Agent Assignment in customizing

- If you don't maintain org. assignment, you need to set "General Task" for Workflow Template and Standard Task. 

Best regards

Jonathan

entry.title: Re: SAP PMR ( Promotion for Retail) Help
entry.content:
Hi,

Free content from SAP is available only form SAP help pages here:
https://help.sap.com/docs/CARAB/dfa9dfcd457e4ba7acdfb03f30877d5f/b59f5b5392e21f37e10000000a423f68.html?locale=en-US

There is a paid option also, corresponding 3 days long workshop can be found with code W26PMR on training.sap.com

Best regards,
Andras

entry.title: Re: Problem with Select-Options
entry.content:
Hi Raymond,

The values are getting captured in below order only and appended in select-options in the same order.

But i am getting the values (while displaying) in below order, also the 1st value is getting replaced by the last value, which should not happen.

Regards,

Farhan

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere connection to SAP ARIBA (SAP RISE Subs...
entry.content: Depending on the skill profile, another option could be to use the BTP application as laid out in this mission.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK: Attachment delete button not working in Web...
entry.content:
MDK web preview runtime was introduced two years ago. This would help customers testing the latest features before rolling them to production.

  • For any MDK major release (like 24.4.0), the preview web runtime will be updated first and, after two weeks, the production web runtime will be updated.
  • For any MDK patch release (like 24.4.1), both the preview and production web runtimes will be updated at the same time.

entry.title: Re: Transform your business by transforming your business processes
entry.content:
Hey @michael_sokollek  - I do not understand the promotion of the package:

RISE (public cloud) customers cannot use Process Insights with their S/4 HANA cloud solution - Help Portal . 

Can you comment?

 

Best regards, Hannes

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of SuccessFactors Learning Token Server
entry.content:
Hi Andrea, 

The SuccessFactors Learning token server will reach End of Maintenance on November 17, 2023 and will be Deleted on November 20, 2026.

Deprecation Details Migration from the SuccessFactors Learning token server to the platform token server improves API support for customers. The SuccessFactors Learning OAuth token server uses HTTP basic authentication (Client ID and Secret) for token requests compared to the platform token server which supports the more secure SAML Assertion Based token request.

Note: You should discontinue using the SuccessFactors Learning token server and start using the more secure platform token server. In the future, SAP will support an OpenID Connect (OIDC) protocol-based solution using Identity Authentication. When that solution is available, we will provide further guidance.

If you have existing OCN that uses the the old Learning Tokens for access then yes it would be eventually impacted. The authentication would need to be updated with the OAuth 2.0 with your vendor.

For existing trainings already imported they may not be impacted. The training URLs will not change even for imported ones. It's the authentication that's changing and the URL will not have an impact. Also, the courses have vendor's URL and not LMS, so it won't be impacted.

entry.title: SAP Activate Methodology Accelerators - Error
entry.content:
Good morning everyone,

We are accessing the public documentation on the SAP Activate Methodology within the Roadmap and reviewing the Excel document titled "Project-Plan_EN_24Q1-Activity and Task-Level.xlsx" where we are having issues with 2 documents in particular.

1) ID S4H.0376 – Data Migration Issues and Risks Template: The source URL has an associated document other than the one in the "S4H_127" title that is not a data migration document is OCM.

2) ID S4H.0378 – Data Migration Quality Tracking: Same error as case 1, associated source is not correct.

Does anyone know the correct source for these two documents?.

Is there another public SAP Activate database that we can consult?.

Thank you all and best regards.

entry.title: Re: fuzzy search with multiple name fields
entry.content:
thanks - the "or" suggestion works fine.

the code now looks like this:

 

CLASS zz9xx_cl_ac_fuzzy_search_prem DEFINITION
   PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_amdp_marker_hdb.

    TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_pa0002,
             fuzzy_score TYPE zfuzzy_similarity,
             vorna       TYPE pa0002-vorna,
             rufnm       TYPE pa0002-rufnm,
             nachn       TYPE pa0002-nachn,
             name2       TYPE pa0002-name2,
             pernr       TYPE pa0002-pernr,
           END OF ty_pa0002.

    TYPES: tt_pa0002 TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_pa0002.

    CLASS-METHODS get_fuzzy_pa0002 IMPORTING VALUE(im_first_name)       TYPE string
                                             VALUE(im_last_name)        TYPE string
                                             VALUE(im_fuzzy_similarity) TYPE zfuzzy_similarity
                                   EXPORTING VALUE(t_pa0002)            TYPE tt_pa0002.

  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS zz9xx_cl_ac_fuzzy_search_prem IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD get_fuzzy_pa0002 BY DATABASE PROCEDURE FOR HDB LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT
                      USING pa0002.
    t_pa0002 = select  SCORE() as fuzzy_score, vorna, rufnm, nachn, name2, pernr
              from pa0002
              where ( (  contains (  ( vorna, rufnm) ,  :im_first_name , fuzzy( :im_fuzzy_similarity ) )
                      AND (  contains (  nachn ,  :im_last_name , fuzzy( :im_fuzzy_similarity ) )
                             or contains (  nachn ,  :im_last_name , fuzzy( :im_fuzzy_similarity ) ) )

                       ) and endda = '99991231'
                  ) ORDER BY fuzzy_score DESC
                  ;


  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: Using AMDP in CDS and Some Useful Functions
entry.content:
Instead of passing a where condition, why not pass the individual ranges in some form and use them directly in the query? That would also avoid recompilation of the filter and query plan and might improve performance a little more.

Note that applying the filter the way you did already is the way of using a dynamic where clause in the query. APPLY_FILTER is not the same as making a query and then throwing away rows in hindsight. Think of it as "defining" the query and then adding a filter to its "definition". The query is not executed immediately (the debugger does that, but only so you can see what would be the result if you didn't apply the filter). So if your performance is low, it is likely due to missing indexes and not due to APPLY_FILTER.

For passing parameters to a HDB CDS view maybe section "Invoking CDS views with parameters" in CDS view syntax also works for HDB SQLScript.

entry.title: Re: OData Filtering in SAP Build Apps – Could This Work For You?
entry.content:
Sorry to have missed this reply.

SAP Build Apps sometimes does not know the schema of the response, so it will not provide you with autocomplete of the fields. The way around this is to use a formula, where you can specify anything you want. Note you might get a warning in red saying it doesn't recognize the field, but you can still use it.

SAP Build Apps can recognize the schema if you run a test in the data resource (Data tab) and then click SET SCHEMA FROM RESPONSE.

entry.title: SOP with Forecst Planning
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I would like to check with you regarding forecast planning, we are using SOP with forecast planning.

We have changed the Forecast model to N as we don't anymore to plan this material, we have the following job which execute with different steps every month. In the step when RMCP6BIN is running the forecast values are keep updating in MC95. 

Not sure why this keep updating though we kept the model as N. Please let me know if you have any idea.

Thanks

Satish

entry.title: Usage Procedure Logging SAP Tables
entry.content:
I have Usage Procedure Logging activate in my system , but i am considering to stop the Job 
RSCVR_TRIGGER_COLLECT , i don't find the SAP Tables where that information is stored , i need to know those SAP Tables in order to start a deletion because i need space in the database!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Usage Procedure Logging SAP Tables
entry.content:
To de-activate UPL, please just delete the UPL job /sdf/upl_periodic_ext_job from managed system with steps below:

  1. Open SM37;
  2. Check for the job named “/sdf/upl_periodic_ext_job"
    1. Enter the user as a wildcard (*)
    2. Extend the time period forward by 2-3 days
  3. Execute;
  4. When the list is returned; Delete any “Scheduled” or “Released” instances of the job.

Please note that the UPL data is not stored on managed system but is sent to solution manager system for storage.
So on managed system side, there is no such UPL storage table to delete.

Best Regards,
David

entry.title: Re: How does valies assigned to fields Menge an BETRAG at start of FM ' mb_calculate_values' ?
entry.content: First read some documentation on QUAN fields, internal and exeternal formats.

entry.title: Configuration of protocols
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to know which protocols are activated and how they are configured in my new HANA Cloud.

I found the configuration of some protocols (e.g. for SAL, erro logs and tables in IMG) but not for others. Does anyone know where to find the configuration (not the protocol itself) of the following protocols?

  • Change Documents

  • Change Logs 
  • System Logs
  • User Change Log
  • User-Change logs
  • Transaction logs
  • Change and Transport System (CTS) Logs

  • Application Log

Thank you

entry.title: Re: OCC extension and cache manager
entry.content:
Hello Vitalii,

I might be answering this too late (but hopefully this would help someone else later on). I just found out about the 2211 version of the Extending Server-Side Caching documentation that works for my OCC extension. 

The cache manager definition of yours is very likely outdated for the OCC extension as I believe it was meant for the old addOn approach instead. The 2211 version of the guide is working for me. 

Eric

entry.title: Material has status: Technical Defect (delivery is not allowed)
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I tested Advanced Returns Management in Return to Supplier (BMK) at SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Firstly, I created Purchase Order - Advanced with Order type: Enh.Ret.to Supplier.

And then created Outbound Delivery in Background with My Purchase Orders - Due for Delivery.

I am facing an error message Material has status: Technical Defect (delivery is not allowed).

What do I need to check and configure for this process?

SAP Supply Chain Management 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement 

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Sac Dimension Comment
entry.content:
Hi Rosanna,

Dimension comments are stored globally and should be available to any story that has the same dimension view.

Note that there are limitations under what conditions dimension comments can be viewed. For example, dimension comments are only supported on tables with the option of Optimized Presentation enabled.

Have you checked the online-help regarding dimension comments and verified that your new story is valid? If you add a new dimension comment in the new story can you view the new comment but not the old one?

You can find the online help regarding this feature here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/ee4c734f5c104f349009f176973273f7.html?locale=en-US

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Displaying a PDF File in SAP Analytics Cloud, Analytic App with Custom Widget
entry.content:
Hi Ferry,

Good Day!

After downloading the required PDF custom widget files from github(https://github.com/ferrygun/SACPDFViewer), we attempted to upload them after adjusting relevant changes in JSON. However, during the resource file upload process, we encountered the following error. I have attached the JSON and resource file that we are trying to upload into SAC. 

I kindly request your assistance in fix this issue so that we can utilize the PDF widget to meet our specific requirements.

JSON Code: We made modifications only to the JSON file, while the JS scripts remain unchanged (we are utilizing the same code from GitHub).
{
  "id": "com.fd.djaja.sap.sac.pdfviewer",
  "version": "0.0.2",
  "name": "PDFViewer",
  "description": "PDF Viewer",
  "newInstancePrefix": "PDFViewer",
  "icon": "",
  "vendor": "Ferry Djaja",
  "eula": "",
  "license": "",
  "webcomponents": [
    {
      "kind": "main",
      "tag": "com-fd-djaja-sap-sac-pdfviewer",
      "url": "/pdfviewer.js",
      "integrity": "",
      "ignoreIntegrity": true
    },
    {
      "kind": "styling",
      "tag": "com-fd-djaja-sap-sac-pdfviewer-aps",
      "url": "/aps_pdfviewer.js",
      "integrity": "",
      "ignoreIntegrity": true
    }
  ],
  "properties": {
    "metadata": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "For internal use",
      "default": ""
    },
    "PDFURL": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "PDF URL",
      "default": ""
    },
    "title": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "title",
      "default": ""
    },
    "height": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "height",
      "default": ""
    }
  },
  "methods": {
    "getPDFURL": {
      "returnType": "string",
      "description": "Get the PDF URL",
      "parameters": [],
      "body": "return this.PDFURL;"
    },
    "setPDFURL": {
      "description": "Set PDF URL",
      "parameters": [
        {
          "name": "value",
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The new PDF URL"
        }
      ],
      "body": "this.PDFURL = value;"
    },
    "getTitle": {
      "returnType": "string",
      "description": "Get the title",
      "parameters": [],
      "body": "return this.title;"
    },
    "setTitle": {
      "description": "Set the title",
      "parameters": [
        {
          "name": "value",
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The new title"
        }
      ],
      "body": "this.title = value;"
    },
    "getHeight": {
      "returnType": "string",
      "description": "Get the height",
      "parameters": [],
      "body": "return this.height;"
    },
    "setHeight": {
      "description": "Set the height",
      "parameters": [
        {
          "name": "value",
          "type": "string",
          "description": "The new height"
        }
      ],
      "body": "this.height = value;"
    }
  },
  "events": {
    "onStart": {
      "description": "Specify the SAC Script that shall be triggered when the Export process is started."
    }
  }
}

Thanks,

Pradeep

entry.title: DMC SAP Build Workzone Integration
entry.content:

I'm trying to find information on how to integrate SAP DMC with SAP Build Workzone (aka SAP Launchpad service). However, it doesn't seem to be supported - which is strange as SAP Build Workzone has it's own Launchpad.

Best regards,

Frank

entry.title: Re: Pricing Error: Mandatory pricing PR00 is missing
entry.content:
SOLUTION- TCODE-VK11 (CREATE CONDITION RECORD)

FOLLOW STEPS-

*)GO TO TCODE-VK11

*)SELECT- EPR0-ENERG UNIT PRICE

SELECT- KEY COMBINATION-MATERIAL/BATCH

*)SELECT-BATCH NO-SAL02, AMOUNT-101, VALID FROM-06.07.2023 TO 31.12.1999

save

https://www.learntosap.com/sderrorpage3.html

entry.title: Question regarding enabling the Extended Integration Impact Analysis for SAP Readiness Check
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are working to execute SAP Readiness Check and prepare to migrate to S/4HANA.

It shows that 3061414 - Enabling extended integration impact analysis for SAP Readiness Check can not be installed on our system. Is there a workaround to import this note?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Question regarding enabling the Extended Integration...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please note that in order to perform the extended integration analysis as part of the Readiness Check, the ST-A/PI component version must be updated to 01U* SP02 (and implement SAP Note 3072059), or 01U* SP03+.

Please review the "Reasons and Prerequisites" section of note 3061414. There is currently no workaround available for this.

Kind regards,
SAP Product Support

Hi experts

Tab (Goals) in Classic View of report centre cannot be translated. I downloaded the language packs but cannot find the tab name in both English and Spanish.

When I search Objectives or Goals in text replacement, I still can't find the tab. 

I will appreciate your input.

entry.title: Configuring SAP CI/CD pipeline for Deploying ReactJS application in Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
In this blog, we will discuss how to integrate SAP CI/CD pipeline for deploying ReactJS application on SAP Cloud Foundry environment.

You will learn,

  • How to create and build a ReactJS application.
  • How to configure and run SAP CI/CD Pipeline service.
  • How to create GitHub Webhook for automatically build, test and deploying the code changes.

 

Prerequisites

  • You have an SAP BTP Global or trial account.
  • Node installed in your system.
  • You have a GitHub account.

 

Setting up React Application

step 1: Create your react application using the create-react-app. The create-react-app is an excellent tool which allows you to create and run React project very quickly by wrapping all the required dependencies.

npx create-react-app reactcicd

step 2: To ensure that the application is running as expected, open the terminal and navigate to the application folder and type the below command. The application gets automatically hosted in the default server localhost:3000 and you’ll get the following screen.

npm start

 step 3:  Now create manifest.yml file for determining the Cloud Foundry app configurations and paste the below contents.

 ---
applications:
- name: your-app-name
path: build/
instances: 1
buildpack: https://github.com/cloudfoundry/staticfile-buildpack.git
memory: 256M

 step 4: Build the application using the below command, you will see the build folder getting added to your  project. 

npm run build

 Also create a Staticfile with the following content in the build folder as shown below

 

 

 

 

 

 

step 5: Now create a repository in your GitHub and push the changes. Make sure to remove build folder from the gitignore file since it is added default while creating the react project, we require it for deployment. For more details on how to deploy react application refer this link react-CF-deploy 

 

Enable SAP Continuous integration and Delivery Service

step 1: Login into SAP BTP Cockpit and choose the subaccount to which you want to deploy your application.

step 2: Select Service Marketplace from the side pane and search for Continuous Integration and Delivery service. Click the create button

step 3: Create popup will appear then choose the plan you want to and click create button at the bottom. Choose View Subscription and wait until the status changes to Subscribed.

step 4: Once the status is changed to subscribed navigate to Security → Role Collections from the left-hand pane. Choose role collection CICD Service Administrator and click edit.

step 5: Navigate to users section click edit then Add a new row in the Users section table, enter your user id, Keep the identity provider as default and click save.

 

Configure your credentials

step 1: Go to Services → Instances and Subscriptions from the pane. Choose the application icon located next to the Continuous Integration & Delivery subscription. Now we need to add credentials for GitHub, CF and Webhook.

step 2: Let’s first go with GitHub credentials. If your GitHub repository is private, you will need to provide with the necessary credentials to access it. You can skip this in case of public repository.

step 3: In Create Credentials popup make sure you give unique name within the subaccount. Select the type as basic authentication and provide your git credentials. Use personal access token as a password. Then choose create.

step 4: Now repeat the same steps for adding CF credentials. Here you have to provide your SAP BTP cockpit username and password.

step 5: For configuring webhook credentials change the type from Basic Authentication to Webhook Secret. Then generate the webhook secret copy it somewhere safe and finally choose Create.

 

 Add a CI/CD job

step 1: Navigate to the Jobs tab and choose the icon to add a new job. Provide unique name for the job.

step 2: Click on the icon inside the Repository input field. You will get a popup then choose add repository., Enter your git repository clone URL. You can add any name of your choice. It need not to be matched with your repo. Choose your saved credentials for git and webhook.

step 3: For Branch, enter the GitHub branch of your repository from which you want to receive push events. In this example, master. Select Cloud Foundry Environment from the dropdown in the Pipeline field.

step 4: In the BUILD section choose npm as your build tool. For Build Tool Version, select the latest node version.

step 5: Under the Release section, switch on the execution of the Deploy to Cloud Foundry Space. Since we have already given name in the manifest file, we can skip the name field. 

Replace the placeholders API Endpoint, Org Name and Space with the values in the Cloud Foundry environment to which you want to deploy. You can get the values from your subaccount overview in the SAP BTP cockpit.

step 6: For Deploy Type, choose standard and select your previously created CF credentials. Leave remaining fields default then finally choose create.

 

Create a GitHub Webhook

GitHub webhooks allow you to automate CI/CD builds. Whenever you push changes to your GitHub repository, a webhook push event is sent to the service to trigger a build of the connected job.

step 1: To create a webhook in GitHub, you need payload URL. Select your repository and choose Webhook Data from the right pane. You will see a below popup:

step 2: Now sign in into your GitHub account. In your project, go to the Settings tab.

step 3: From the left pane, choose Webhooks then Add webhook. Enter the Payload URL, Content type from the popup and  the Secret that you had saved previously. For all other settings, leave the default values and add.

 

Verify your Build

You have to trigger your job manually the first time after creation.

step 1: In Jobs tab, select your job and choose Run. Verify that a new tile appears in the Builds view. This tile should be marked as running.

step 2: Wait until the job has finished and verify that the build tile is marked as successful.

step 3: Navigate to your space in the SAP BTP cockpit and check the list of installed applications. Now you can see your application got added. 

step 4: Select your application and launch it with the application route. You can see the react application deployed. 

 

You have now successfully created a CI/CD pipeline and deployed your Reactjs application to SAP BTP. From now on for every commit you can see the job getting triggered with commit id displayed under builds section.

entry.title: JSON Web Encryption in SAP CPI using public Key
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a requirement where the incoming payload has to be encrypted using various components of RFC 7516 - JSON Web Encryption (JWE) (ietf.org) JSON Web encryption like cipher text , IV , Additional Auth Tag.

How do u suggest this can be acheived? Can you suggest a script to accomplish this? external jars?

entry.title: Is First Time Manager ()
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to build an OnChange rule that would update a custom string to help us flag new managers and design some training around that.

I've made it as so, which then would be added as a change rule to the custom field i have in jobinfo under "New Manager" - but of course i just get blank values. 

Any idea if I have made a mistake somewhere?

 

Kind regards,

Antonis

entry.title: Re: Transform your business by transforming your business processes
entry.content:
Hi CFGHS,

thanks for your comment. The blog refers to RISE with SAP, our private edition. Grow, our public edition, in deed does not support Process Insights as per your documentation. As always, please check your specific entitlement for your individual contract.

Best regards, Michael

entry.title: Change text display order in MM02
entry.content:
Hi everyone 

Can i change the text display order in  MM02 ???
